name: Barbecued Meat Patties
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Half-half (equal parts water and milk)
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------BASTING SAUCE--------------------------
1/2 c Ketchup
1/4 c Water
1 tbsp Lemon juice
1 tbsp Brown sugar
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tsp Hot pepper sauce (adjust to taste)
Stir to blend well. Add a dash of salt and black pepper.
1 In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground meat, egg, and finely chopped onion.
2 Add soy sauce and ketchup to the mixture. Mix half-and-half and cornstarch into the meat mixture until fully blended.
3 Form portions of the meat mixture into even, slightly thick meat patties.
4 Place the patties on a preheated barbecue grill.
5 Broil 3-4 inches from the heat source, basting with sauce and turning the patties occasionally for even browning.
6 Grill for 12-15 minutes total or until cooked to your liking. The cooking time depends on how well you prefer your meat cooked.
7 Serve the meat patties on hamburger buns or with French fries.
